artifact.summary: GameAgentCore defines shared game-agent doctrine, safety boundaries, and operating loops. It is a survey target only here, separate from U.S.S. Wayfarer.
artifact.classification: External game-agent architecture and doctrine project; not the ship.
known_risks: Game-specific memory belongs in each game's own workspace, not in GameAgentCore.
Save, online, purchase, and irreversible-action boundaries require explicit human approval.
artifact.recommended_next_action: Treat GameAgentCore as a read-only doctrine survey target until a later mission scopes a test use.
evidence: D:\GameAgentCore\AGENTS.md: declares Game Agent Core Agent Charter.
D:\GameAgentCore\SAFETY_RULES_GLOBAL.md: declares Global Game Agent Safety Rules.
